summary: Comprehensive testing of 'Converti DDT in Fattura' feature - Backend API (18/18 tests passed) and Frontend UI (all features verified). The feature correctly converts DDT documents to invoices, mapping lines, client data, and totals automatically.

backend_api.POST /api/ddt/{ddt_id}/convert-to-invoic: PASS - Creates new invoice from DDT
backend_api.Invoice lines mapping: PASS - code, description, quantity, unit_price (prezzo_netto), vat_rate, line_total, vat_amount
backend_api.Global discount applied: PASS - sconto_globale from DDT applied to invoice taxable
backend_api.DDT converted_to field: PASS - Set to invoice_id after conversion
backend_api.Error 422 (no client): PASS - Returns 422 for DDT without client

frontend_ui.DDT editor 'Converti in Fattura' button: PASS - Visible when status != 'fatturato' and no converted_to
frontend_ui.DDT editor 'Vai alla Fattura' button: PASS - Visible when status == 'fatturato' and converted_to exists
frontend_ui.Button styling: PASS - Convert button has amber border, Vai alla Fattura has emerald/green
frontend_ui.Confirmation dialog: PASS - Shows 'Convertire questo DDT in Fattura?' with details

critical_code_review_comments: Convert endpoint correctly uses prezzo_netto (cascaded discount price) for invoice line unit_price
Payment method/terms inference from payment_type_label works correctly (riba, bonifico, 30gg, 60gg, etc.)
DDT status properly updated to 'fatturato' with converted_to link after conversion
Invoice created with converted_from link back to DDT for bidirectional tracking
Duplicate conversion protection (409) prevents accidental double-invoicing
Client validation (422) ensures invoices always have a valid client
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test clients, DDTs, and invoices created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: DDT Convert to Invoice feature fully tested. Key details: 1) POST /api/ddt/{ddt_id}/convert-to-invoice creates invoice with document_type='FT'. 2) Invoice lines use prezzo_netto from DDT (cascaded discount price). 3) DDT status changes to 'fatturato' with converted_to set to invoice_id. 4) Frontend shows 'Converti in Fattura' (amber) for non-fatturato, 'Vai alla Fattura' (green) for fatturato DDTs. 5) Confirmation dialog required before conversion. 6) Previous DDT tests in iteration_25 (20/20 pass).
